title: skimmia rugosa
intro: Skimmia rugosa is a flowering plant species native to China and Japan, belonging to the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus or rue family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Skimmia rugosa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and protect against infections. Herbal preparations of Skimmia rugosa can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
